summary: A Fox News 'Special Report' segment (FOX NEWS ALERT) with anchor Harris Faulkner interviewing DHS Asst. Sec. Tricia McLaughlin (remote, before U.S. flag and DHS seal), who rebuts claims that innocent people were swept up in alleged gang-member deportations and defends DHS intelligence assessments. B-roll shows ICE/HSI agents making arrests and an armored vehicle in Aurora/Denver, CO. Anchor and official talking with news lower-thirds, no music. Cable-news interview, not produced youth-appeal content.
notable_text: ASST DHS SEC REBUTS CLAIMS INNOCENT PEOPLE SWEPT UP IN ALLEGED GANG MEMBER DEPORTATIONS; TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS ASST SEC FOR PUBLIC AFFAIRS; NOEM VISITS LATIN AMERICA TO TALK CRIME, MIGRATION; POLICE ICE; FOX NEWS ALERT
